description: Drag-to-reveal image comparison slider with a divider handle, click-to-jump, and keyboard control.
keyFeatures: Side-by-side before and after images with a draggable reveal divider.
Click anywhere on the frame to jump the handle position.
Keyboard accessible — arrow keys nudge the divider in 2% steps.
Customizable divider, handle size, colours, corner radius, and initial position.
Touch-friendly pointer events with a circular drag handle.
descriptionParagraphs: Drag the handle to reveal the two images. Click anywhere to jump the divider, or focus and use the arrow keys.
Swap before and after images, tune handle styling, and set the starting reveal position from the controls panel.
